Patch Set 6: Verified+1 Code-Review+1

I have been running it on our Power8 nodes with no issues. I also tried it on our Cray system that is using the OFED 3.12 stack as well. Again no problems.

Patch Set 6:

Jeremy I'm not such a fan of using fmr_cache to turn on and off FMR.

Patch Set 6:

This patch conflicts with http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/12747/ which is a bugfix so it will be landed first.

I suggest you to rebase on top of that patch even if by the time you see this message it has not been landed yet.

Patch Set 6:

This patch is super old so rebasing 12747 on top of this patch might not be the best idea. This should be landed first then I can rebase 12747.

Patch Set 6:

Those two patches serious conflicting. Both used only one available value for define work item type. So, re-base will require to expand the mask or significantly re-work the patch. Maybe better 12747 can be re-worked?

Patch Set 6:

(1 comment)

Looking at this patch and 12747 I think 12747 handles the flags more correctly. Here we have:

IBLND_WID_MR = (IBLND_WID_RX | IBLND_WID_RDMA)

That doesn't sound right. Now patch 12747 has:

IBLND_WID_RDMA = (IBLND_WID_TX | IBLND_WID_RX) which sounds more reasonable but still questionable.

I have a local copy of this patch rebased on LU-519 patch which expands the flags. The new patch has been tested and it works fine :-) I will push as soon as LU-519 is landed and we sort out the flags. Perhaps the flags should be:

#define IBLND_WID_INVAL  0
#define IBLND_WID_TX       1
#define IBLND_WID_RX       2
#define IBLND_WID_RDMA  4
#define IBLND_WID_MR      8
#define IBLND_WID_MASK  15UL

Patch Set 6:

Hi James,

Patch http://review.whamcloud.com/12747 for LU-519 just landed to master branch.

Patch Set 6:

I haven't had a chance yet to test this over IB WAN but it seemed fine locally.  Since FMR is no loner supported on current cards and eventually will be deprecated I think it would be better for this patch to include some changes to the structures, functions, and module parameters so that it can be phased out later.  Perhaps adding new generic parameters for memory registration and only preferring FMR if the existing configuration has fmr_cache=1.

Patch Set 8:

I always receive the memory window bind error during my first connect with this patch.  Unfortunately I don't have cycles to get the bottom o fit.  All of these issues happen with a MLX5 system connecting to MLX4.

Patch Set 8:

I'm seeing occasional messages during the first connection when attempting to run some lnet_selftest between an MLX4 FMR system and MLX5 FR.  These messages are on the MLX5 system which I believe are Memory Window Bind Errors.

mlx5_0:dump_cqe:254:(pid 17815): dump error cqe
00000000 00000000 00000000 00000000
00000000 00000000 00000000 00000000
00000000 00000000 00000000 00000000
00000000 08007806 25000065 020790d0

parents.subject: LU-7256 tests: wait current LFSCK to exit before next test

commit.subject: LU-5783 o2iblnd: Add Fast Reg memory registration support
commit.message:
LU-5783 o2iblnd: Add Fast Reg memory registration support

FMR is deprecated and it not supported by the mlx5 driver.
This patch add memory management extensions support as
backup of FMR.

Change-Id: I58f01aac3cbef0edc0934d75bcf13888f84beb0d
Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/17606
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Tested-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Doug Oucharek <doug.s.oucharek@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
